violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards and inside walls of refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as frequently as necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
